=== ip a ===
1: lo: <LOOPBACK,UP,LOWER_UP> mtu 65536 state UNKNOWN
    inet 127.0.0.1/8 scope host lo

2: eth0: <BROADCAST,MULTICAST,UP,LOWER_UP> mtu 1492 state UP
    link/ether [REDACTED_MAC_ADDRESS]
    inet [PRIVATE_WSL_IP]/20 brd [PRIVATE_WSL_BROADCAST] scope global eth0

=== ip route ===
default via [PRIVATE_WSL_GATEWAY] dev eth0 proto kernel
[PRIVATE_WSL_SUBNET]/20 dev eth0 proto kernel scope link src [PRIVATE_WSL_IP]

=== hostname -I ===
[PRIVATE_WSL_IP]

=== /etc/resolv.conf ===
# This file was automatically generated by WSL.
nameserver [PRIVATE_WSL_DNS_RESOLVER]
